name: Scalloped Corn Deluxe
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat corn, sugar, lemon juice, and water to boiling in a Dutch oven or large kettle.
2. Boil uncovered for 2 minutes. Remove from heat; let stand for 10 minutes.
3. Cut enough kernels from the ears to measure 2 cups.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Melt 2 tablespoons butter or margarine in an 8-inch skillet.
6. Cook and stir onion and green pepper in butter until onion is tender. Remove from heat.
7. Stir in flour, salt, paprika, mustard, and pepper. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture is hot and bubbly. Remove from heat.
8. Gradually stir wine and milk into the flour mixture. Heat to boiling, stirring until ready to use.
9. When ready to fill, remove jars from water and drain.
10. Pour into an ungreased 1-quart casserole.
11. Melt 1 tablespoon butter. Remove from heat. Stir in cracker crumbs.
12. Sprinkle crumbs evenly over corn mixture. Bake uncovered for 30 to 35 minutes until bubbly.
NOTE: Cheddar cheese MUST be in its natural form.
